title: Automated Prokaryotic Genome Assembly Analysis Pipeline

in_dir.description: Input directory for Nextflow containing reference and modified genome FASTA files.

out_dir.description: Output directory where pipeline results will be written.

log_dir.description: Directory where log files will be stored.

max_cpu.description: Maximum number of CPUs available for pipeline processes.

clean_work.description: Clean the Nextflow work directory after successful completion.

run_truvari.description: Run Truvari benchmarking to evaluate structural variant calls.

run_syri.description: Run SyRI to identify genomic rearrangements between reference and assembly.
